# Public Pulse Agency

> Bangladesh's 360° digital marketing and political PR agency, based in Dhaka.
> Sister concern within Pulse Group (Event Pulse, Tender Pulse, Social Pulse, The Pulse Today).

## Services

- [Political PR & Image Building](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/political-pr): Candidate image building, narrative engineering, crisis communication, 5-phase election PR.
- [Social Media Management](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/social-media): Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok end-to-end management.
- [Content Production](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/content-production): Video, photo, motion graphics, drone shoots — strategy-driven content.
- [Paid Ads & Campaigns](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/paid-ads): Meta Ads, Google Ads, YouTube — ROI-focused paid media.
- [Hospitality Marketing](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/hospitality): Resorts, restaurants, hotels — from Cox's Bazar to Sylhet.
- [Brand Building & Design](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/brand-building): Logo, identity, packaging, brand guidelines.
- [SEO & Website Development](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/seo-website): Local SEO, technical SEO, conversion-focused websites.
- [Analytics & Performance Reporting](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/analytics-reporting): Dashboards, ROI tracking, actionable insights.
- [Influencer & KOL Marketing](https://publicpulse.com.bd/services/influencer-marketing): Micro to mega influencer campaigns.

## About

- [About Public Pulse Agency](https://publicpulse.com.bd/about): Founded 2024, 50+ active clients across 10+ industries, 300%+ avg engagement growth.
- [Pulse Group](https://publicpulse.com.bd/group): Parent group — Public Pulse, Event Pulse, Tender Pulse, Social Pulse, The Pulse Today.
- [Contact](https://publicpulse.com.bd/contact): Phone +880 1717-714676 · Email info@publicpulse.com.bd · WhatsApp available.
